naming.errorMessage: Folder names must be in Title Case (starting with uppercase) and can contain letters, numbers, spaces, dashes, or parentheses.
Workflow names must be in Title Case (starting with uppercase) and can contain letters, numbers, spaces, dashes, or parentheses.
Node names must be in Title Case (starting with uppercase) and can contain letters, numbers, spaces, dashes, parentheses, or colons.

notes.errorMessage: Notes are required for Code nodes to explain their logic.

naming.errorMessage: Variables declared in Set/Edit Fields nodes must be in camelCase.

language.errorMessage: Text, names, and variables must be written in English.
